findings.evidence: The proof already constructs exactly this mapsto hypothesis at lines 77-84 before applying `HasFDerivWithinAt.comp`; the existing chain rule uses the general `Set.MapsTo` form at `JHolomorphic.lean:258-263`, and Mathlib provides `HasFDerivWithinAt.mono` at `Mathlib/Analysis/Calculus/FDeriv/Basic.lean:203`.
findings.fix: Generalize the signature to include `{t : Set V'}` and an assumption such as `Set.MapsTo (fun y : V' => eV.symm y) t s` (or `t ⊆ eV '' s`) and conclude holomorphicity within `t`; derive the image-set lemma as a specialization if desired.
findings.issue: `IsJHolomorphicWithinAt.transport` only proves the exact-image case `(eV '' s)`, but the natural within-at statement should allow any transported/local domain whose points map back into `s`.

summary: The transport statements are mostly at the expected level, but the within-set lemma hardcodes the image set where the surrounding API exposes arbitrary mapped domains. Generalize that lemma so later chart-domain restrictions do not need to reprove the derivative transport manually.
